analysis.summary: This is a student worksheet for grades 4-5 financial literacy that teaches students how to convert general goals into SMART goals using a structured framework. The handout guides students through setting both short-term school year goals and long-term lifetime goals using specific, measurable, achievable, relevant, and time-based criteria.

entities.name: SMART Goal Framework
entities.description: Goal-setting methodology using Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-based criteria

entities.name: SMART Goal Brainstorm and Planning
entities.description: Student handout worksheet for goal setting activities

entities.name: School Year Goal
entities.description: Short-term goal to be accomplished within one academic year

entities.name: Lifetime Goal
entities.description: Long-term goal to be accomplished over a person's lifetime

entities.name: Specific Criteria
entities.description: SMART goal component requiring clear and well-defined objectives

entities.name: Measurable Criteria
entities.description: SMART goal component requiring quantifiable outcomes

entities.name: Achievable Criteria
entities.description: SMART goal component ensuring realistic and attainable goals

entities.name: Relevant Criteria
entities.description: SMART goal component ensuring goals align with personal interests and values

entities.name: Time-based Criteria
entities.description: SMART goal component requiring specific deadlines and timeframes

entities.name: Reading Example Goal
entities.description: Sample goal demonstrating SMART goal conversion process
